name: 谛观·卦脉解读 | Shefu Multi-Domain Oracle
description: 「谛观」出品：正易心法卦脉解读引擎，核心管道领域无关，支持多落处投射。v0.4.0 落处：射覆（猜物特征画像）/问事（态势推演画像）/考试/天气/市场。默认大衍筮法起卦，支持梅花易数和六爻纳甲。不判断吉凶，只展开可能性。
description_en: Multi-domain hexagram oracle by Diguan. Core pipeline is domain-agnostic, supporting pluggable landing domains. v0.4.0 domains: Shefu (object feature portrait) / Wenshi (situation deduction) / Exam / Weather / Market. Default Dayan Yarrow casting, with Plum Blossom and Six-Yao as alternatives. No fortune-telling—only unfolding possibilities.
